title: buxus cephalantha var. cephalantha
intro: Buxus cephalantha var. cephalantha, also known as the Philippine boxwood, is a species of plant within the genus Buxus, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Buxaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Buxus cephalantha var. cephalantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Buxus cephalantha var. cephalantha can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
